title: Rusty Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful fried rice dish made with rustic ingredients.
instructions: Heat the fried lard in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the rusty rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
Push the rice to one side of the skillet and crack an egg into the other side.
Scramble the egg and then mix it with the rice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
